Effect: Lung Bonus.name: 效果：肺部加值 Effect: Lung Bonus
Effect: Lung Bonus.description:
在接下来的一分钟内，每名PC的攻击和DC都获得+2状态加值，并获得持续1分钟的10点临时生命值。这些增益是在血石其他属性之外额外获得的。

For the next minute, each PC gains a +2 status bonus to their attacks and DCs, as well as 10 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute. These benefits are in addition to the Bloodstone's other properties.

Evade the Undead.name: 规避不死生物 Evade the Undead
Evade the Undead.description:
在探索尤娅之望的废墟时，你一边从一个地点移动到另一个地点，一边规避在镇上游荡的不死生物。尝试进行一次 @Check[type:stealth|dc:10|traits:action:sneak,secret,action:evade-the-undead] 检定，以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}穿过不死生物身边；或者进行一次 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:13|traits:action:evade-the-undead] 或 @Check[type:athletics|dc:13|traits:action:evade-the-undead]，快速移动到让不死生物失去你位置的踪迹。或者，你也可以尝试进行一次 @Check[type:society|dc:15|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret,action:evade-the-undead] 检定，以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}并规划前往目的地的最高效路线。

  • 大成功：你获得 1 点规避点。
  • 成功：你不会获得或失去规避点。
  • 失败：你失去 1 点规避点。
  • 大失败：你失去 2 点规避点。

While exploring the ruins of Yua's Hope, you move from one location to another while evading the undead that roam the town. Attempt a @Check[type:stealth|dc:10|traits:action:sneak,secret,action:evade-the-undead] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} past the undead or a @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:13|traits:action:evade-the-undead] or @Check[type:athletics|dc:13|traits:action:evade-the-undead] to move so quickly that the undead lose track of your position. Alternatively, you can attempt a @Check[type:society|dc:15|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret,action:evade-the-undead] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} and plot the most efficient route to your destination.

  • Critical Success: You gain 1 EP.
  • Success: You don't gain or lose EP.
  • Failure: You lose 1 EP.
  • Critical failure: You lose 2 EP.

1. 死坟末土幸存者

Claws of the Tyrant: Addons.name: 暴君之爪：附加内容 Claws of the Tyrant: Addons
暴君之爪：附加内容 Claws of the Tyrant: Addons
Claws of the Tyrant: Addons.text:
作者：Chasarooni

嗨 |˶˙ᵕ˙ )ﾉﾞ，我是这个模组的作者。我把它整理成了一组我觉得有帮助的杂项资源，以及我一路制作的各种地图等等，这样这些成果就不会遗失。希望你会喜欢它们，也祝你在这场冒险中玩得开心！

模组内容

请查看以下章节，了解其中具体包含了哪些内容。

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.TncFN3HfVIpIk59L]{1. 死坟末土幸存者}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.B1fogQPE8sjY5Qjh]{2. 献给奥泽姆的余烬}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.kWKbOhCv7Mjxadbr]{3. 血与信仰}

by Chasarooni

Hi |˶˙ᵕ˙ )ﾉﾞ, this is the module author. I put this together as a collection of miscellaneous resources I found helpful, as well as any maps etc. that I made along the way so the work isn't lost, I hope you enjoy them, and enjoy this Adventure!

Module Contents

Look at the following sections for more information on what specifically is included.

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.TncFN3HfVIpIk59L]{1. Gravelands Survivors}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.B1fogQPE8sjY5Qjh]{2. Ashes for Ozem}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.kWKbOhCv7Mjxadbr]{3. Of Blood and Faith}

1. Gravelands Survivors.name: 1. 死坟末土幸存者 1. Gravelands Survivors
1. Gravelands Survivors.text:
资源

这是对《冒险》各个章节的 Addons 中所包含资源的总结。

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.LUrawCr6IwG4hg95]{准备告别}

添加了一些地图，以帮助展示前几个事件中的场景。

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.s1IrAOohrVxXuAzA]{事件 1：未知墓志铭}

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.dXgvX8G980HbbCws]{事件 2：工作继续}

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.bwNLCb6FTHJAnbKT]{事件 3：整理遗体}

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.MTyXPofYNUuWkq4v]{事件 4：葬礼挽歌}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Yk6QotH2TPPC2e4Z]{尤娅之望}

包含了 @UUID[Item.o0Dy04c8xUi4fIf9]{规避不死生物} 这个探索动作，以便在探索尤娅之望时简化让玩家为其进行掷骰。

另外还有一份 @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.IQG2zLulF99TdI4F]{尤娅之望地图} 作为给玩家的指引（基于他们对这座城镇及其布局的记忆）。

@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO.JournalEntryPage.DeALWKnwYbayA4Ag]{前往维鲁米斯}

感谢可爱的 @Icarus，这里附上了一张地图来展示前往维鲁米斯的路线。

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.z78KUiOJBV4Xoa0Z]{前往维鲁米斯之路}

此外，这里还提供了带路径和不带路径的图片。

带路径

无路径

Resources

This is a summary of the resources included in Addons for each section of the Adventure

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.LUrawCr6IwG4hg95]{Preparing for Farewell}

Added some maps to help illustrate the scenes for the early events

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.s1IrAOohrVxXuAzA]{Event 1: Unknown Epitaph}

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.dXgvX8G980HbbCws]{Event 2: Work Continues}

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.bwNLCb6FTHJAnbKT]{Event 3: Preparing the Body}

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.MTyXPofYNUuWkq4v]{Event 4: A Funeral Dirge}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Yk6QotH2TPPC2e4Z]{Yua's Hope}

Included the @UUID[Item.o0Dy04c8xUi4fIf9]{Evade the Undead} exploration action to simplify having players roll for it while exploring Yua's Hope.

Also a @UUID[JournalEntry.ntwh8NNYToNZNUVq.JournalEntryPage.IQG2zLulF99TdI4F]{Map of Yua's Hope} to serve as a guide for the players (based on their memories of the town and its layout)

@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO.JournalEntryPage.DeALWKnwYbayA4Ag]{The March to Vellumis}

Thanks to the lovely, @Icarus, included a map to illustrate the route to Vellumis.

  • @UUID[Compendium.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons.claws-of-the-tyrant-addons-maps.Scene.z78KUiOJBV4Xoa0Z]{Road to Vellumis}

Additionally here is the image with and without the paths

With Paths

No Paths
